'''Korren''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] who served as a [[Technicians/Legends|technician]] within the [[New Republic Special Forces/Legends|New Republic Special Forces]] and was assigned to the [[Katarn Commandos]]. He worked with the team's other [[Technician/Legends|technician]], [[Mian Hoob]].
